section_a.a1_explanation: Processes customer name, email, and transaction history for context

section_b.b1_explanation: Chatbot is available on public website and mobile app
section_b.b2_explanation: Security review completed, pentest scheduled for Q2 2026

section_c.c1_explanation: Reduce customer service response time and handle 24/7 inquiries
section_c.c2_explanation: Expected 60% reduction in response time, 40% cost savings

section_d.d1_explanation: AI system owner is the Head of Customer Service
section_d.d2_explanation: Human agents can take over conversation at any time
section_d.override_mechanism: Escalation to human agent button always visible

section_e.e1_explanation: Tested with 1000+ test cases including edge cases
section_e.test_coverage: Normal cases, edge cases, adversarial inputs
section_e.e2_explanation: Falls back to search-based FAQ if LLM unavailable
section_e.e3_explanation: Daily monitoring of response quality and user satisfaction
section_e.monitoring_metrics: Response time, user rating, escalation rate, accuracy

section_f.f1_explanation: Bias testing conducted across demographic groups
section_f.bias_check_method: A/B testing with diverse user groups
section_f.f2_explanation: Automated bias detection with manual review process
section_f.correction_mechanism: Weekly bias review with model retraining pipeline

section_g.g1_explanation: Users are informed they are chatting with AI assistant
section_g.notification_method: Clear disclosure at start of chat session
section_g.g2_explanation: Can provide reason codes for recommendations
section_g.explanation_method: Natural language explanations with confidence scores

general_notes: Sample AI project data for testing purposes. This represents a well-governed AI project that passes all hard stops and scores high on governance dimensions.
